name: Cheese Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, beat together butter, sugar, eggs, and shredded cheddar cheese until well combined.
3. Reduce mixer speed to low. Gradually add in the flour mixture (1 cup flour, baking powder, salt, and red pepper). Beat until a soft dough forms.
4. Using a wooden spoon, stir in enough of the remaining flour until a stiff dough forms. Divide dough into two equal halves.
5. Place both halves about 3 inches apart on a lightly greased baking sheet. Shape each into a log measuring approximately 9 inches long and 1 inch wide.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until firm and golden brown. Remove logs from the oven and reduce temperature to 300°F.
7. Transfer logs to a cutting board. Using a serrated knife, carefully cut each log diagonally into slices about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Arrange slices, cut sides down, on the baking sheet. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until the slices are dried but not browned, turning over each slice once.
9. Cool and store in an airtight container.
